# Summary

Describe the bug that was fixed.

---

## Related Issue

Closes #

---

## Root Cause

Explain what caused the bug.

---

## Fix Description

Explain the approach taken to fix the issue.

---

## Risk Level

- [ ] Low – small isolated fix
- [ ] Medium – touches multiple files
- [ ] High – affects core logic

---

## Testing / Validation

Explain how the fix was verified.

Examples:

- reproduction scenario tested
- CI passed
- linting successful

---

## Rollback Plan

How this change can be reverted if needed.

Example:

- revert PR

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Bug reproduction confirmed
- [ ] Fix validated
- [ ] CI checks passed
- [ ] Related issue linked
